title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Control-Loop Lens: Failure Taxonomy
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops failure taxonomy increment in an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify planning, tool, state, recovery, authorization, and communication failures.
Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
